title: Recommend a Sponsor and Get a Free iPlayground Ticket!
content:
iPlayground 2026 will take place on July 25–26 at NCCU CPBAE, bringing together 300+ iOS engineers, product builders, and designers. As Taiwan's annual showcase for the iOS community, this year's event will feature well-known local developers, KOLs, invited speakers from international conferences, and community activities designed to bring people together.

To make all of this happen, we are looking for sponsor referrals from friends across the community. From now until May 22, if you recommend a company contact and the introduction leads to a sponsorship conversation and partnership, we will thank you with one two-day iPlayground 2026 ticket, valued at NT$4,000, including one commemorative shirt. If you have ideas for sponsorship collaboration, please leave your information and we will get in touch soon.
